name: meme-deepfake-triage
description: Dedicated visual disinformation pipeline: fetches, OCR-extracts, reasons about, and generates factcheck overlays for memes, deepfakes, and manipulated screenshots. Triggered by watchdog visual flag.

steps.name: fetch-asset
steps.prompt_template: Fetch and cache the visual asset at URL: {{input.asset_url}}. Store locally and return asset_hash (SHA256), asset_type (image|video|gif), and local_path.

steps.name: ocr-extract
steps.prompt_template: Extract all text visible in the image at {{cached_asset.local_path}}. Include captions, overlaid text, watermarks, chart labels, and any embedded statistics. Return extracted_text as a single string.

steps.name: visual-reason
steps.prompt_template: Analyze the image at {{cached_asset.local_path}} with extracted text: {{ocr_result.extracted_text}}. Determine: (1) Is overlaid text authentic or post-edited? (2) Does context match claimed event/date/location? (3) Are charts or statistics manipulated? (4) Deepfake indicators? Return visual_verdict, reasoning_summary, confidence 0.0-1.0, and deepfake_indicators list.

steps.name: generate-overlay
steps.prompt_template: Using nano-banana-pro skill, generate a factcheck overlay for the image at {{cached_asset.local_path}}. Apply a red badge with text: WARNING FACT CHECKED: FALSE. Include the LibreFang logo. Save to output/visual/overlays/{{cached_asset.asset_hash}}.png. Return overlay_path.

steps.name: escalate-to-inquisitor
steps.prompt_template: Investigate the claim embedded in this visual asset. Visual analysis result: {{visual_analysis}}. OCR text: {{ocr_result.extracted_text}}. Source URL: {{input.source_url}}. Provide full fact-check verdict.

steps.name: deliver-visual-debunk
steps.prompt_template: Publish visual debunk. Verdict: {{inquisitor_verdict}}. Overlay image: {{overlay_result.overlay_path}}. Draft bilingual (SK+EN) social media post using humanizer skill and deliver via api-gateway.
